LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD STANDING AN ENFORCABLE PROMISE TO MODIFY THE LOAN, THE SPECIFICS OF FRAUD CLAIM AND THE ELEMENTS OF THE OTHER CAUSE OF ACTION. MR. NUNLEY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFTS' DEMURRER TO PLTF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, REGINALD DAVID
NOTICE OF RULING ON DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NA

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NA'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE FATAL FLAW IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS THAT IT DOES NOT ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANT PROMISED IT WOULD MODIFY THE LOAN IF PLAINTIFF STOPPED PAYING, BUT ONLY THAT IT WOULD NOT MODIFY WHILE PLAINTIFF WAS IN PAYMENT STATUS. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE THAT STATEMENT IS FALSE, NOR DOES PLAINTIFF ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANT PROMISED ANY PARTICULAR TERMS THAT COULD BE ENFORCED. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(C). MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
